name: Season 1
overview: Two boys who were bitter volleyball rivals in middle school join forces on their high school team to take on other schools with a vengeance.

name: Season 2
overview: Hinata, Kageyama and the rest of Team Karasuno head to Nekoma's special training camp in Tokyo to prepare for the Spring High Tournament.

name: Karasuno High School vs Shiratorizawa Academy
overview: The Karasuno High volleyball team has finally made it to the Miyagi Prefectural finals. But they're up against the reigning champs: Shiratorizawa.

name: TO THE TOP
overview: New challenges lie ahead as the team prepares for Nationals. But when Kageyama is invited to a training camp, Hinata takes matters into his own hands.
